2026-04-09IRCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActAppointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office)Appointment of Roxane Jacqueline Stanners of Estérel, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective April 30, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office)
precis: Appointment of Roxane Jacqueline Stanners of Estérel, Quebec, to be a part-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Montréal Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of three years, effective April 30, 2026.
